generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance BuildingLightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded actuator within Building Control Systems (BCS) that executes lighting control commands generated by the Digital Twin, adjusting levels based on virtual model outputs via standardized middleware interfaces (Eclipse Hono/Ditto)."
]

instance HVACSetpointController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical controller within BCS that adjusts HVAC setpoints according to commands from the Digital Twin, enabling real-time operational adjustments based on virtual model predictions and sensor feedback."
]

instance OccupancyStatusController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building automation component that manages occupancy-based system responses (e.g., lighting, HVAC) based on real-time data synchronization between physical and virtual representations."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded sensor measuring real-time temperature conditions within building infrastructure, feeding data into the Digital Twin for environmental monitoring and control optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensor detecting presence and movement patterns within building spaces, providing occupancy data for space utilization analysis and adaptive control strategies."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring ambient light levels to support dynamic lighting control policies and energy optimization within the Digital Twin framework."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyConsumptionMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building infrastructure meter tracking real-time energy consumption data for operational analytics and predictive maintenance within the Digital Twin system."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

instance PostOccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Specialized sensor collecting post-occupancy feedback data to refine control policies (as demonstrated in BOREALIS project) and improve long-term operational efficiency."
    DTDFVocab:producedData PostOccupancyDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionMeter
]

instance PostOccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PostOccupancySensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMCoreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantic-rich 3D foundation model representing building geometry, spatial relationships, and component properties in IFC or proprietary BIM formats, enriched with runtime semantics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelTransformationEngine
]

instance RuntimeSemanticsLayer : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Extension layer embedding device metadata (sensor/actuator configurations) and middleware integration points (Hono/Ditto endpoints) onto the BIM core model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance ControlPoliciesModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Declarative model defining adaptive control strategies including reinforcement learning-based policies for lighting optimization (as in BOREALIS project)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelTransformationEngine
]

instance OperationalDataStore : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured repository storing real-time datasets including sensor telemetry, energy consumption logs, and operational metrics for analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted, OccupancyDataTransmitted, LightLevelDataTransmitted, EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted, PostOccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ODTEValidationMetric
]

instance VisualizationAssets : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 assets including 3D models, shaders, and UI elements for interactive monitoring and simulation within the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:fromData BIMCoreModel, RuntimeSemanticsLayer
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5
]

// C11: Enablers
instance RevitBIMTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM software used for creating and enriching the core model with runtime semantics through domain-specific modeling extensions."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelTransformationEngine
]

instance ArchiCADBIMTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Alternative BIM software supporting the creation of semantic-rich building models compatible with the Digital Twin framework."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelTransformationEngine
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware platform providing device connectivity and telemetry ingestion for bidirectional communication between physical sensors and the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataIngestionService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware solution enabling bidirectional communication and state management between virtual and physical components via standardized interfaces."
    DTDFVocab:enables DittoMiddleware
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D visualization engine providing interactive monitoring, simulation, and real-time data representation within the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables UnrealEngineVisualization
]

instance ModelTransformationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering tool automating model-to-model and model-to-text transformations for generating runtime interfaces and deployable DT artifacts."
]

instance ODTEValidationMetric : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Overall Digital Twin Entanglement metric system assessing and validating the fidelity of the Digital Twin's representation of the physical twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelValidationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous visualization and analysis service providing real-time operational data (energy consumption, environmental conditions) through immersive 3D interaction."
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalAnalyticsInsight
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating alerts for equipment failures or performance degradation based on sensor data anomalies and predictive analytics."
    DTDFVocab:provides EquipmentFailureAlertAction, PerformanceDegradationInsight
]

instance AdaptiveLightingOptimization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning-based service optimizing lighting control policies using post-occupancy sensor data to improve energy efficiency."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyEfficientAdjustmentAction, OccupancyPatternInsight
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service automating generation of runtime interfaces for bidirectional communication between virtual and physical systems, reducing manual configuration."
    DTDFVocab:provides InterfaceGenerationAction
]

instance ServiceExtensibilityFramework : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Modular architecture providing standardized extension points for integrating custom services (energy management, occupant comfort) without disrupting core DT functionality."
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomServiceIntegrationAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OperationalAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboards showing energy consumption trends, occupancy patterns, and environmental conditions for facility managers."
]

instance EquipmentFailureAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated alert system notifying maintenance teams of potential equipment failures detected through predictive analytics."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PerformanceDegradationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of sensor data anomalies indicating performance degradation in building systems requiring attention."
]

instance EnergyEfficientAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of HVAC setpoints and lighting schedules based on reinforcement learning optimization recommendations."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OccupancyPatternInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of post-occupancy sensor data revealing space utilization patterns for better facility planning."
]

instance InterfaceGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated generation of middleware interfaces for seamless communication between physical actuators and virtual control systems."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CustomServiceIntegrationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Framework for integrating third-party services (e.g., energy management, comfort optimization) through standardized APIs."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C12: Environments/Components
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, OccupancySensor, LightLevelSensor, EnergyConsumptionMeter,
                 BuildingLightingActuator, HVACSetpointController, OccupancyStatusController
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains BIMCoreModel, RuntimeSemanticsLayer, ControlPoliciesModel,
                 OperationalDataStore, VisualizationAssets,
                 RevitBIMTool, EclipseHono, EclipseDitto, UnrealEngine5
]

instance ControlSystemComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Integrated control system combining sensing, processing, and acting components to enable bidirectional synchronization between physical and virtual representations."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

// New instances to resolve missing references
instance DataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service responsible for ingesting and processing sensor data from physical devices into the Digital Twin system."
]

instance DittoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware component of Eclipse Ditto providing bidirectional communication and state management for the Digital Twin."
]

instance ModelValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service validating the semantic consistency and completeness of enriched BIM models and Digital Twin artifacts."
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization service powered by Unreal Engine 5 providing interactive 3D monitoring and simulation capabilities."
]

instance FidelityAssessmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service assessing the overall fidelity of the Digital Twin's representation of the physical twin through various metrics."
]

instance DeploymentPipeline : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing the deployment of Digital Twin artifacts and ensuring proper integration with physical systems."
]

instance ArtifactGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating deployable Digital Twin artifacts from model transformations."
]

instance ControlCommandService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling the execution of control commands from the Digital Twin to physical actuators."
]

instance InteractiveDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing interactive dashboard interfaces for real-time monitoring and decision support."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Virtual-to-physical interaction occurs via **control signals** generated by the DT and transmitted back to physical actuators (e.g., lighting systems, HVAC units) through the middleware layer (**Eclipse Hono/Ditto**). The framework supports **bidirectional communication** by generating runtime interfaces from BIM models, enabling the DT to execute control logic (e.g., adaptive lighting policies) and adjust physical systems in real-time. This interaction is orchestrated through **standardized extension points**, allowing seamless integration of custom services and automated deployment of control commands."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time**, with continuous synchronization between the physical and virtual systems. While specific time rates (e.g., milliseconds for lighting, seconds/minutes for HVAC) are not explicitly detailed in the documents, the framework emphasizes **low-latency data exchange** via Eclipse Hono and Ditto to ensure near-instantaneous updates. The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the fidelity of this synchronization over time, ensuring the DT remains aligned with the physical asset's operational state."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with the following components:
   - **Core DT Hub**: Centralized platform integrating BIM models, runtime data, and control logic, acting as the **unified interface** for stakeholders (e.g., facility managers, engineers).
   - **Middleware Layer**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** enabling **real-time bidirectional communication** between PT and DT, including device management, telemetry ingestion, and command execution.
   - **Visualization Layer**: **Unreal Engine 5** providing an interactive 3D environment for monitoring, simulation, and user interaction.
   - **Service Layer**: Modular services (e.g., predictive analytics, adaptive control) deployed as **microservices** with standardized interfaces, allowing dynamic extension.
   - **Data Layer**: Structured storage for BIM models, operational data, and control policies, ensuring scalability and interoperability.
   The constellation is designed for **scalability** across building infrastructures and supports **decentralized twinning** through hierarchical or modular deployments."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans **multiple lifecycle stages**, including:
    - **Design phase**: BIM models are enriched with device and control logic configurations.
    - **Construction phase**: Physical sensors and actuators are deployed and integrated.
    - **Operation phase**: Real-time monitoring, control, and optimization occur.
    - **Refurbishment/Adaptation phase**: The DT evolves with updates to physical infrastructure or operational requirements.
    The DT represents the building **as designed (ideal)**, **as manufactured**, and **as operated**, with continuous synchronization to reflect real-world conditions."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
   - **Semantic Alignment**: The DT’s representation is grounded in **BIM’s comprehensive semantics**, including geometric, spatial, and functional data, with runtime extensions for operational aspects.
   - **Real-Time Synchronization**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** middleware validates and synchronizes data streams between PT and DT, reducing **semantic drift** (as discussed in Abbasi et al.).
   - **Validation Metrics**: The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE)** metric quantifies the DT’s accuracy in reflecting the PT’s state, with thresholds defined for operational fidelity.
   - **Uncertainty Modeling**: The framework accounts for **data gaps** (e.g., missing sensor readings) and **model inaccuracies** (e.g., deviations in as-built vs. as-designed) through probabilistic or heuristic corrections.
   - **Verification**: Automated checks validate the correctness of generated DT artifacts (e.g., middleware configurations, visualization assets) before deployment."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection relies on **Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware** for real-time data exchange, but specific network protocols (e.g., MQTT, RESTful) are not detailed in the provided documents. The middleware facilitates bidirectional communication between physical sensors/actuators and the DT, ensuring low-latency synchronization. Security considerations (e.g., encrypted connections) are implied but not explicitly described."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed as a **scalable framework** with no explicit details on cloud/on-premise infrastructure, containerization (e.g., Docker), or deployment architectures. The focus is on **modular service integration** and **runtime adaptability**, enabling deployment across heterogeneous environments. The framework abstracts away infrastructure concerns, prioritizing interoperability and extensibility over specific hosting details."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The framework supports **interoperability across heterogeneous systems**, enabling integration with external platforms (e.g., facility management software, ERP systems) through standardized middleware interfaces (Eclipse Hono/Ditto). However, specific integrations (e.g., city-wide digital twin ecosystems) are not detailed in the provided documents. The modular architecture facilitates seamless communication with external systems via well-defined extension points."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT framework adheres to **BIM standards** and leverages open-source middleware (**Eclipse Ditto/Hono**) for interoperability. While specific standards like **IFC (Industry Foundation Classes)** or **OPC UA** are not explicitly mentioned, the use of BIM as the semantic backbone implies compliance with AECO-specific modeling conventions. The framework prioritizes **standardized extension points** to ensure compatibility with industry tools and protocols."
]
